description: Add persistent task statuses with safe parallel backend and UI delivery.

userStories.title: Add task status storage defaults
userStories.description: As a team member, I want each task to persist a status with a pending default so progress survives reloads and existing tasks gain a safe initial state.
acceptanceCriteria: Task records persist one of pending, in_progress, or done.
Existing tasks default to pending after the storage change.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add shared task status type and validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want one shared status definition and validation path so application logic and persistence accept the same values.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared task status type exposes pending, in_progress, and done values.
Validation rejects unsupported task status values before persistence.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Persist task status updates
userStories.description: As a team member, I want valid task status changes to save reliably so task progress remains accurate across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend status update action stores a new valid task status for the requested task.
Invalid status updates fail validation without mutating stored tasks.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show status badges on task cards
userStories.description: As a team member, I want each task card to show a badge for current status so I can scan progress quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Each task card shows a visible badge for pending, in progress, or done.
Badge text matches stored task status for every rendered task card.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add task status control to task list
userStories.description: As a team member, I want a status control in task list rows so I can update progress without leaving the list.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list rows expose pending, in progress, and done status options for each task.
Changing status control saves through the backend update path and refreshes rendered task state.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter task list by status
userStories.description: As a team member, I want to filter the task list by status so I can focus on one work state at a time.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list offers All, Pending, In Progress, and Done filter options.
Selecting a status filter shows only tasks matching the chosen status, except All which shows every task.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
